message:
refactor(build_coord): simplify shell_command_payload by removing redundant nesting

The outer `if idx + 2 < tokens.len()` guard was unnecessary since the
while-loop's `tokens.get(arg_idx)` already handles bounds checking.
Removing the guard eliminates one level of indentation and makes the
control flow clearer without changing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
